basic_details.job_title: SRES DID Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: State Rural Employment Society - District Implementing Division
basic_details.short_information: State Rural Employment Society - District Implementing Division (SRES DID) Recruitment 2026: State Rural Employment Society - District Implementing Division has released the official notification for 1 Technical Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years as on 01 January 2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 3 years Diploma in Civil Engineering from recognized Institute/University with Computer Skill. Preference will be given to candidate having B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering with minimum one year of experience in any recognized Govt. Institute/Agencies.
qualification.details: Technical Assistant: 3 years Diploma in Civil Engineering from recognized Institute/University with Computer Skill. Preference will be given to candidate having B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering with minimum one year of experience in any recognized Govt. Institute/Agencies.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 22,000/- per month with other allowances as admissible.
salary_details.details: Technical Assistant: Rs. 22,000/- per month with other allowances as admissible.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SRES DID Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:eastgarohills.gov.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SRES DID Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Technical Assistant post is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 3-year Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized institute or university with computer skills. B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering with one year of experience is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Assistant post is 32 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 22,000/- per month, along with other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the SRES DID Technical Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You must download the application form, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Technical Assistant announced under this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this position?
faq.answer: The job is located in Williamnagar, East Garo Hills, Meghalaya.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Applicants need to submit Xerox copies of their Bio Data, Testimonials, Educational Qualification certificates, and one passport-size photograph.
